problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
summary: Design an AI-powered evaluation platform to automate the evaluation process of government tenders, reducing evaluation time from weeks to hours, minimizing litigation risk, ensuring CAG compliance, and eliminating corruption risks.
key_steps: OCR + LLM pipeline reads all documents
AI scores every bidder against every criterion
Generates a ranked bidder list and audit-ready report
optimization_claims: Weeks of evaluation compressed to hours
